ui.press_enter: Press ENTER to return to menu...
ui.choose_or_back: Enter the number or ENTER to go back:
ui.invalid_option: Invalid option '{option}'. Try /search or a number 1-{max}.

donation.title: SUPPORT AUREATOOLS DEVELOPMENT
donation.desc1: AureaTools is 100% free, open-source and libre. It empowers
donation.desc2: network engineers and NOC professionals around the globe.

info_local_network.name: Local IP & Interfaces
info_local_network.title: IP ADDRESSING INFORMATION (IPv4 / IPv6)
info_local_network.mobile: Mobile Environment: Termux / Android OS Detected.
info_local_network.termux_hint: ! Notice: Install the 'Termux:API' app and run 'pkg install termux-api' to read the Wi-Fi card.

lan_scan.name: LAN Device Scanner
lan_scan.title: LOCAL NETWORK DEVICE SCANNER
lan_scan.searching: SEARCHING FOR DEVICES ON LOCAL NETWORK (ARP)...
lan_scan.error: Error fetching devices from system ARP cache.

traceroute.name: Network Traceroute
traceroute.title: ROUTE MAPPING (TRACEROUTE)
traceroute.termux_hint: Run the following command to install:
traceroute.icmp_hint: TIP: Routers responding with * may be blocking ICMP or filtering traffic.

speedtest.name: Bandwidth Speedtest
speedtest.title: BANDWIDTH TEST (SPEEDTEST)
speedtest.not_installed: Module not installed. Run: pip install speedtest-cli
speedtest.result: DOWNLOAD: {dl:.2f} Mbps | UPLOAD: {up:.2f} Mbps | PING: {ping} ms

wifi_monitor.name: Live Wi-Fi RSSI Monitor
wifi_monitor.title: REAL-TIME WI-FI SIGNAL MONITOR (WALK-TEST)
wifi_monitor.header: AUREA ADVANCED WI-FI MONITOR  (Ctrl+C to exit)

dns_benchmark.name: Local DNS Benchmark
dns_benchmark.title: LOCAL DNS BENCHMARK
dns_benchmark.desc: Measures the real resolution time on global servers and your network gateway.
dns_benchmark.tip: TIP: The Local Gateway should ideally respond faster than global servers.

dnssec.name: DNSSEC Validation
dnssec.title: DNSSEC CHECKUP & VALIDATION
dnssec.no_internet: ERROR: Device is not connecting to the internet.
dnssec.no_validate: ALERT: Current DNS does NOT validate DNSSEC! (Accepted corrupted)
dnssec.validates: SECURE: Current DNS VALIDATES DNSSEC correctly!
dnssec.comm_fail: WARNING: Communication failure with secure test domain.
dnssec.no_dnssec: Domain does NOT have DNSSEC encryption active.

traffic_monitor.name: Traffic Flow & ASN Monitor
traffic_monitor.title: REAL-TIME TRAFFIC ANALYSIS (FLOW & ASN MONITOR)
traffic_monitor.mapping: Mapping data flow... (Press Ctrl+C to stop)
traffic_monitor.header_active: AUREA NET ACTIVE | Recording to: {file} | (Ctrl+C to stop)
traffic_monitor.mobile_warning: [!] MOBILE MODE: Due to Android security (no root), only this terminal's traffic will be visible.
traffic_monitor.total: Total of {count} connections documented and saved.

ipam.name: IPAM & Subnet Calculator
ipam.title: ADVANCED IPAM & SUBNETTING CALCULATOR
ipam.input_hint: Enter the IP with CIDR mask (e.g.: 192.168.10.0/24)
ipam.note_ip: NOTE: The IP entered ({ip}) belongs to network {network}
ipam.too_small: Network too small to subdivide without losing addresses.

banner_grab.name: Banner Grabbing
banner_grab.title: BANNER GRABBING & FINGERPRINTING
banner_grab.desc: Identifies the daemon/server version running behind an open TCP port.
banner_grab.closed: Port closed or filtered by Firewall.
banner_grab.no_banner: Service did not return a readable banner.

spoofing_audit.name: DNS Spoofing Auditor
spoofing_audit.title: SPOOFING & PHISHING AUDITOR (DNS GUARD)
spoofing_audit.desc: Mapping domain armor against fake email sending...
spoofing_audit.querying: Querying security records in DNS zone...
spoofing_audit.spf_soft: MODERATE (Softfail) — Fake emails go to Spam.
spoofing_audit.spf_missing: SPF MISSING: Anyone can forge emails from this domain!
spoofing_audit.dmarc_none: ALERT — Monitor mode only. Spoofing still possible.
spoofing_audit.dmarc_missing: DMARC MISSING: No compliance guidelines configured.
spoofing_audit.dkim_note: * Note: DKIM is not tested here as it requires the server's specific selector.

ip_intel.name: IP Intelligence & Recon
ip_intel.title: IP INTELLIGENCE & ASN LOOKUP
ip_intel.desc: Gets geolocation, carrier and BGP routing (ASN) data for any IP.
ip_intel.private_warning: Address {ip} is for local/private use and has no public record.

sec_headers.name: HTTP Security Headers Scan
sec_headers.title: SECURITY HEADERS SCANNER (HTTP SEC)
sec_headers.desc: Analyzes a web server's armor against attacks like XSS and Clickjacking.
sec_headers.server_hidden: Server Hidden: Daemon identity is protected.
sec_headers.excellent: Status: EXCELLENT. Server adopts best Web Defense practices.
sec_headers.regular: Status: REGULAR. Some important policies are missing.
sec_headers.critical: Status: CRITICAL. Site is exposed to primary attack vectors.
sec_headers.fail: Failed to connect to web server: {error}

mac_oui.name: MAC OUI Vendor Lookup
mac_oui.title: MAC & OUI ANALYZER
mac_oui.desc: Identifies the device manufacturer from the MAC Address.
mac_oui.not_found: Manufacturer not found (invalid MAC or private OUI).

whois.name: Native WHOIS Client
whois.title: NATIVE WHOIS CLIENT (PORT 43)
whois.desc: Queries the public registry of a domain directly on port 43.
whois.fail: WHOIS error: {error}  (Server may not support direct mapping)

password_gen.name: Secure Password Generator
password_gen.title: SECURE PASSWORD GENERATOR
password_gen.desc: Generates ultra-high entropy passwords for equipment and clients.
password_gen.tip: TIP: Use the mouse to select and copy. None of them are stored on disk.

port_scanner.name: Multithreaded Port Scanner
port_scanner.title: PORT SCANNER (THREADED)
port_scanner.desc: Scans TCP ports in parallel using a thread pool.

ssl_inspector.name: SSL/TLS Certificate Inspector
ssl_inspector.title: SSL/TLS CERTIFICATE DETAILS
ssl_inspector.desc: Analyzes validity, issuer, and signature of SSL certificates.
ssl_inspector.subject: Subject (CN):
ssl_inspector.warning: WARNING: Expires in less than 30 days!

mtr.name: Advanced MTR
mtr.title: MY TRACEROUTE (MTR)
mtr.desc: Continuous traceroute with hop latency and packet loss statistics.
mtr.header: Hop | IP Address | Loss% | Min | Avg | Max | Jitter

peeringdb.name: PeeringDB Lookup
peeringdb.title: PEERINGDB NETWORK SEARCH
peeringdb.desc: Queries public PeeringDB for network IXP and facility presence.
peeringdb.not_found: Network AS{asn} not found in PeeringDB.

looking_glass.name: BGP Looking Glass
looking_glass.title: BGP LOOKING GLASS (RIPE RIS)
looking_glass.desc: Inspects route visibility, path, and communities from public RIPE RIS servers.

community_decoder.name: BGP Community Decoder
community_decoder.title: BGP COMMUNITY TRANSLATOR
community_decoder.desc: Decodes standard/large BGP communities into human-readable details.

dns_prop.name: DNS Propagation Checker
dns_prop.title: DNS PROPAGATION CHECKER
dns_prop.desc: Checks a domain DNS records across global resolvers in parallel.

sla_calc.name: SLA & Uptime Calculator
sla_calc.title: SLA & DOWNTIME CALCULATOR
sla_calc.desc: Calculates allowable downtime based on contract SLA percentage.

lan_discovery.name: LAN Auto-Discovery & NetBox Sync
lan_discovery.title: LAN AUTO-DISCOVERY & NETBOX SYNC
lan_discovery.desc: Concurrent ping sweep, MAC/OUI mapping, and NetBox IPAM sync.

mikrotik_ssh.name: MikroTik SSH Auditor & NetBox Sync
mikrotik_ssh.title: MIKROTIK SSH AUDITOR & NETBOX IPAM
mikrotik_ssh.desc: Accesses routers via native SSH, maps IPs/interfaces/VLANs/neighbors and syncs with NetBox.

bgp_agg.name: BGP CIDR Route Aggregator
bgp_agg.title: BGP CIDR ROUTE AGGREGATOR & OPTIMIZER
bgp_agg.desc: Mathematically collapses overlapping or adjacent IP blocks to optimize BGP routing table.

multi_ping.name: Multi-Target Connectivity Tester
multi_ping.title: MULTI-TARGET PING TESTER
multi_ping.desc: Pings multiple hosts in parallel and displays comparative latency and loss statistics.

config_diff.name: Config Diff Comparator
config_diff.title: CONFIG FILE COMPARATOR (DIFF)
config_diff.desc: Compares two configuration files side-by-side with color highlights.

dns_deep_inspector.name: DNS Record Deep Inspector
dns_deep_inspector.title: DNS RECORD DEEP INSPECTOR
dns_deep_inspector.desc: Deep queries DNS zones (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS, SOA, SPF, DMARC, DNSSEC).

device_auditor.name: Multi-Vendor Device Auditor & NetBox Sync
device_auditor.title: MULTI-VENDOR DEVICE AUDITOR & NETBOX IPAM
device_auditor.desc: Connects via SSH/Telnet to MikroTik, Huawei, Cisco, and Juniper, mapping topology and syncing with NetBox.

dns_hijack.name: DNS Hijacking Detector
dns_hijack.title: DNS HIJACKING & REDIRECT DETECTOR
dns_hijack.desc: Tests if local DNS queries are intercepted or modified by malicious or rogue resolvers.

cgnat_sim.name: CGNAT Port Exhaustion Simulator
cgnat_sim.title: CGNAT PORT EXHAUSTION SIMULATOR
cgnat_sim.desc: Simulates rapid concurrent socket traffic to test port limits and network NAT behavior.
